ألوان، أثاث، تخزين ذكي، إضاءة وأمان — غر: Colors, furniture, smart storage, lighting and safety — a safe, practical, beautiful kids' room that grows with your child, with build prices in Egypt for every budget
قبل أن تبدأ: 3 مبادئ تحكم تصميم غرفة الط: Before you start: 3 principles that govern kids' room design
1. الألوان — قاعدة محايدة ولمسات متغيّرة: 1. Colors — a neutral base with changeable accents
2. الأثاث — يكبر مع الطفل: 2. Furniture — that grows with the child
أذكى استثمار هو الأثاث القابل للتحويل: س: The smartest investment is convertible furniture: a bed that extends from child size to teen size, a desk that rises with height, and a wardrobe with adjustable shelves. For small spaces, a loft bed frees up the area beneath it for a desk or play corner. For a room for two children, a bunk bed or two beds with storage drawers is the ideal solution.
قاعدة عملية: ضع تخزين الألعاب على ارتفاع: A practical rule: place toy storage at the child's height so they can tidy up themselves, and seasonal clothes up high. Open bins and woven baskets make play and tidying easy, while drawers under the bed use wasted space. Make use of the room's height with a wardrobe that extends to the ceiling, since children accumulate more things than we expect.
اعتمد ثلاث طبقات إضاءة: إضاءة عامة سقفية: Use three layers of lighting: general ceiling light, task lighting at the desk, and a dim night light (a small fixture or warm LED) that reassures the child without preventing sleep. Safety is non-negotiable: anchor every cabinet and shelf to the wall, choose rounded furniture edges, cover electrical outlets, and use low-emission (Low-VOC) paints and materials that are safe to breathe.
أفكار إبداعية حسب عمر الطفل: Creative ideas by the child's age
سرير بحواجز قابل للتعديل، ركن تغيير عملي: A crib with adjustable rails, a practical changing corner, calm colors, a soft washable rug, and closed storage out of reach. The top priority is safety and ease of cleaning.
ركن مذاكرة بإضاءة جيدة، لوح كتابة/سبورة: A well-lit study corner, a writing board/blackboard on the wall, open toy storage within reach, and a theme the child loves done with removable stickers rather than permanent paint.
مكتب دراسة جاد، مساحة لاستقبال الأصدقاء،: A serious study desk, space to host friends, more mature colors they choose themselves, and storage for hobbies. Involve them in the decision — it raises their sense of ownership and responsibility.
أسعار تأثيث غرفة أطفال في مصر 2026: Kids' room furnishing prices in Egypt 2026
سرير + دولاب + مكتب جاهز + إضاءة بسيطة +: Bed + wardrobe + ready-made desk + simple lighting + paint
أثاث نصف مخصص + تخزين موسّع + إضاءة 3 طب: Semi-custom furniture + expanded storage + 3-layer lighting + décor

نصائح المهندسين لتوفير دون التضحية بالجو: Engineers' tips to save without sacrificing quality
استثمر في الأثاث الأساسي، وفّر في الإكسس: Invest in the core furniture, save on accessories:
السرير والدولاب يدومان سنوات؛ أما الثيمة: The bed and wardrobe last for years; the theme and stickers will change, so don't spend much on them.
استغل الارتفاع لا المساحة فقط:: Use the height, not just the floor area:
الرفوف العالية والخزائن حتى السقف توفّر: High shelves and floor-to-ceiling cabinets provide storage without eating into play space.
دهان قابل للمسح، أقمشة سهلة التنظيف، وأر: Wipeable paint, easy-to-clean fabrics, and a durable floor — you'll thank us later.
أشرك الطفل في القرار:: Involve the child in the decision:
اختياره للون أو الثيمة يرفع إحساسه بالمس: Their choice of color or theme raises their sense of responsibility and makes them take care of their room.
